examples: Instead of flushing, they work like a vacuum cleaner sucking away the astronaut's waste.
The nets captured a few more trout than they would have without the flood but did not show substantial flushing of native fish, whose ancestors had, after all, survived many larger natural floods.
The dual-flush toilet I used had a cheap, plastic flushing mechanism that was already broken.
She finds herself flushing with a combination of rage and an almost reckless mirth.
